name: jira
description: Jira discovery and triage workflows: interview and publish an evidence-backed brief for one task, with optional technical repository discovery, or triage a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.

interface.shortDescription: Interview, discover, or triage Jira work.
interface.longDescription: Interviews the user, optionally investigates repositories, and publishes one Jira brief, or triages a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $jira:discovery to interview me, investigate this Jira task, and publish its implementation brief.
